# SecureYeoman

> SecureYeoman is a sovereign AI agent platform that runs entirely on your infrastructure. It provides multi-model intelligence (14 AI providers), enterprise-grade security (RBAC, SSO/SAML, sandboxing, audit trails), multi-agent orchestration (swarms, teams, DAG workflows, A2A protocol), a 200+ tool MCP server, and a full ML lifecycle platform — without sending data off-premises. Dual-licensed: AGPL-3.0 + Commercial.

- Version: 2026.3.3
- 13,659 tests, 163 ADRs, 63 guides
- 36 platform integrations, 200+ MCP tools, 39 CLI commands

## Documentation

- [Getting Started](https://github.com/MacCracken/secureyeoman/blob/main/docs/guides/getting-started.md): Installation, configuration, first run
- [Configuration Reference](https://github.com/MacCracken/secureyeoman/blob/main/docs/configuration.md): All YAML fields and environment variables
- [Feature Reference](https://github.com/MacCracken/secureyeoman/blob/main/docs/features.md): Complete feature breakdown
- [REST API](https://github.com/MacCracken/secureyeoman/blob/main/docs/api/rest-api.md): HTTP API reference
- [WebSocket API](https://github.com/MacCracken/secureyeoman/blob/main/docs/api/websocket-api.md): Real-time WebSocket API
- [OpenAPI Spec](https://github.com/MacCracken/secureyeoman/blob/main/docs/openapi.yaml): OpenAPI 3.1 specification
- [Architecture](https://github.com/MacCracken/secureyeoman/blob/main/docs/development/architecture.md): System architecture overview
- [Security Model](https://github.com/MacCracken/secureyeoman/blob/main/docs/security/security-model.md): Security architecture and threat model
- [White Paper](https://github.com/MacCracken/secureyeoman/blob/main/docs/white-paper.md): Architectural sovereignty and agentic governance

## Guides

- [Integrations](https://github.com/MacCracken/secureyeoman/blob/main/docs/guides/integrations.md): Platform integration setup
- [Knowledge Base](https://github.com/MacCracken/secureyeoman/blob/main/docs/guides/knowledge-base.md): RAG and document ingestion
- [Observability](https://github.com/MacCracken/secureyeoman/blob/main/docs/guides/observability.md): OpenTelemetry, Prometheus, alerts
- [CI/CD Integration](https://github.com/MacCracken/secureyeoman/blob/main/docs/guides/cicd-integration.md): GitHub Actions, Jenkins, GitLab CI
- [Security Testing](https://github.com/MacCracken/secureyeoman/blob/main/docs/guides/security-testing.md): Security testing guide
- [Content Guardrails](https://github.com/MacCracken/secureyeoman/blob/main/docs/guides/content-guardrails.md): PII, toxicity, topic restrictions
- [Kubernetes](https://github.com/MacCracken/secureyeoman/blob/main/docs/guides/kubernetes-deployment.md): Helm chart deployment
- [Deployment](https://github.com/MacCracken/secureyeoman/blob/main/docs/deployment.md): Docker and deployment guide
- [Licensing](https://github.com/MacCracken/secureyeoman/blob/main/docs/guides/licensing.md): AGPL-3.0 and commercial license details
- [Job Completion Notifications](https://github.com/MacCracken/secureyeoman/blob/main/docs/guides/job-completion-notifications.md): Alert rules for workflow/training job events, ntfy channel
- [Troubleshooting](https://github.com/MacCracken/secureyeoman/blob/main/docs/troubleshooting.md): Common problems and fixes

- [ADRs](https://github.com/MacCracken/secureyeoman/tree/main/docs/adr): 163 architecture decision records
